description: Extract hex-hub into hex-nexus (library) + hex-hub (thin binary). Enables hex-desktop to embed the full hub as a Rust dependency without process spawning. Also covers ADR-025 IStatePort abstraction for SQLite/SpacetimeDB swap.

tasks.name: Verify hex-nexus compiles standalone
tasks.description: Run 'cargo build -p hex-nexus' and fix any missing imports, broken module paths, or dependency issues from the extraction. Ensure all routes, orchestration, RL, remote modules compile.

tasks.name: Verify hex-hub thin binary compiles
tasks.description: hex-hub/src/main.rs should import from hex-nexus and just run the server. Verify 'cargo build -p hex-hub' works. The thin binary should have minimal code — just CLI arg parsing and server startup.

tasks.name: Verify SpacetimeDB feature flag
tasks.description: Build with 'cargo build -p hex-nexus --features spacetimedb'. Verify spacetime_state adapter and spacetime_launcher compile behind the feature gate. Build without the flag and verify no SpacetimeDB deps are pulled.

tasks.name: Unit tests for SqliteStateAdapter
tasks.description: Test all IStatePort methods against SqliteStateAdapter with in-memory SQLite. Cover: agent CRUD, task lifecycle, swarm state, RL Q-table operations.

tasks.name: Contract tests for IStatePort
tasks.description: Write port-contract tests that run against ANY IStatePort implementation. Use a test trait with shared assertions. Run against both SqliteStateAdapter and (if spacetimedb feature enabled) SpacetimeStateAdapter.

tasks.name: Public embedding API for hex-nexus
tasks.description: Expose a clean public API: HubConfig, build_router(config) -> axum::Router, SharedState. This is what hex-desktop and any future embedder calls. Document with rustdoc.

tasks.name: Verify hex-desktop uses embedding API
tasks.description: Ensure hex-desktop/src/main.rs calls hex_nexus::build_router() and serves via Tauri's embedded tokio runtime. No code duplication between hex-hub and hex-desktop.

tasks.name: Commit extraction
tasks.description: Stage all hex-nexus files, modified hex-hub files, updated Cargo workspace. Single commit: 'refactor(hex-hub): extract hex-nexus library crate (ADR-025)'

tasks.name: Update ADR-025 status
tasks.description: Mark ADR-025 phases 1-3 as complete. Document the hex-nexus public API surface and embedding pattern.
